news.title: 加拿大反伊朗活动家遇害案两人被控谋杀
news.title0: Two charged in death of anti-Iranian regime activist in Canada
news.content: 加拿大警方指控两人谋杀一名伊朗政权批评者，称其为“针对性事件”，引发加拿大伊朗社区的广泛担忧。
news.content0: Canadian officials have charged two people with murder in what they have called a "targeted incident" that led to the death of an Iranian regime critic, generating widespread concern in the Canadian-Iranian community.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普盟友对伊朗危机反应冷淡
news.title0: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
news.content: 特朗普呼吁盟友协助重开霍尔木兹海峡，但德国等国反应冷淡，称这不是北约的战争，凸显解决危机的复杂性。
news.content0: Throughout his two terms in office, US President Donald Trump has not been shy to criticise – even to attack – Washington's Nato allies.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇获普利兹克奖
news.title0: Pritzker Prize 2026: Chile’s Smiljan Radić wins ‘Nobel’ of architecture
news.content: 智利建筑师斯米利安·拉迪奇凭借其实验性设计，如伦敦的环形展馆，荣获2026年建筑界最高荣誉普利兹克奖。
news.content0: Chilean architect Smiljan Radić, whose often-experimental designs include a doughnut-shaped pavilion in London and a restaurant held up by boulders in Santiago, was named the winner of this year’s Pritzker Prize — an award often dubbed the field’s equivalent to a Nobel Prize — on Thursday.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国大幅降低放弃公民身份费用
news.title0: State Department slashes fee to renounce US citizenship by 80%
news.content: 美国国务院将正式放弃美国公民身份的费用从2350美元大幅削减80%至450美元，新规已生效。
news.content0: The State Department has slashed by about 80% the fee for Americans to formally renounce their U.S. citizenship.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国白宫幕僚长确诊乳腺癌
news.title0: Trump's White House chief of staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with breast cancer
news.content: 白宫幕僚长苏茜·怀尔斯确诊乳腺癌，但表示将边治疗边继续工作。特朗普称赞其为“了不起的斗士”。
news.content0: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles has been diagnosed with breast cancer and will continue in her role as she undergoes treatment.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 青少年起诉马斯克xAI公司AI生成其色情图像
news.title0: Teens sue Musk's xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them
news.content: 三名青少年起诉马斯克的xAI公司，指控其Grok聊天机器人功能被用于生成她们的虚假色情图像，构成儿童色情制品。
news.content0: Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company is facing a lawsuit from teenagers who say the company facilitated child pornography by allowing the creation of sexually explicit images of them.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英军基地周边道路封闭以防范窥探
news.title0: Roads closed and screens put up around RAF base
news.content: 英国一处供美军用于对伊朗行动的皇家空军基地周边道路被封闭，并竖起防护屏，以防止飞机爱好者窥探和拍摄。
news.content0: Roads have been closed and protective screens have gone up around an RAF base used by the United States Air Force (USAF) to launch operations against Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗袭击阿联酋关键港口与迪拜机场
news.title0: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
news.content: 伊朗无人机袭击了阿联酋最大石油港口富查伊拉和迪拜国际机场，继续打击海湾地区的运输和石油基础设施。
news.content0: The United Arab Emirates' (UAE) biggest port and oil storage facility, Fujairah, and Dubai's international airport have come under further drone attacks as Iran continues to target Gulf transport and oil infrastructure.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英肯特郡爆发脑膜炎疫情致两人死亡
news.title0: Meningitis outbreak latest: Deadly meningitis outbreak now detected in three schools - as cases rise
news.content: 英国肯特郡坎特伯雷地区爆发脑膜炎疫情，已导致一名学生和一名大学生死亡，另有11人感染。
news.content0: A school pupil and a university student have died during an outbreak of meningitis in the Canterbury area of Kent. Follow the latest.
news.author: Sky News
